Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Defining the Scope Im focusing now on precisely defining the users goal analyzing a loan application process event log Im starting by clarifying the need for analysis based on two distinct sets of criteria namely strict normative rules and flexible heuristic assessments I am trying to determine what a proper analysis of such an event log would entail

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyzing the Rules I am now deconstructing the established rules both normative and recommended to form a better understanding Ive broken down the strict sequence of steps explicitly noting the order of events and constraints like no skipping or reverting steps Im also cataloging the recommended rules particularly time based targets like credit checks within 24 hours and applicant information within 48 hours of the decision My work is focused on making these rules actionable for log analysis

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Evaluating Event Logs Im now examining specific loan application event log examples case by case For Case 1 I find the normative sequence perfect but theres a minor failure related to the Follow up call desideratum I am analyzing the second case with more detail

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assessing Case Violations Im now zeroing in on Case 2 and the picture looks grim regarding normative adherence The log indicates significant violations Risk Assessment before Credit Check missing Inform Applicant step and an illogical finalization after a rejection The desiderata check reveals the credit check was timely and the Inform Applicant step never occurred For Case 3 the sequence is perfect

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structuring the Findings Im now outlining the structure of the response Ill begin with an introduction clarifying the analysiss purpose Then I will address normative rule violations This is the main part After that I will then discuss desiderata condition failures Finally Ill incorporate interpretations and real world justifications for the behaviors observed in the log

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Detailing Event Log Anomalies Im currently focusing on a deeper dive into the specific violations observed In Case 2 there are serious issues the risk assessment occurred before the credit check the Inform Applicant step was completely skipped and the system finalized documentation on a rejected loan For Task 2 Case 1 just misses a best practice for a follow up call while Case 3 features timeline infractions that though not breaking rules reveal potential service level agreement breaches I am now drafting potential justifications for the Case 2 situation perhaps pointing to system errors or employee inexperience
